command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3DLEw35gkkimUcv.eeb1f1cd43d3 --database 6e38zfddYazj4vVoRnY5Mj --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'purchase_requests' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
LIMIT 20;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
id	int
prNumber	varchar
category	enum
projectId	int
projectTitle	varchar
donorId	int
donorName	varchar
budgetId	int
budgetLineId	int
budgetCode	varchar
budgetTitle	varchar
subBudgetLine	varchar
activityName	varchar
totalBudgetLine	decimal
currency	varchar
exchangeRate	decimal
exchangeTo	varchar
total	decimal
prTotalUsd	decimal
department	varchar
